mobileAbout.heading: Who is Sawan?
mobileAbout.body: I'm Sawan, an aspiring AI/ML Engineer, Fullstack Developer, and Web Scraper from Kathmandu. I love building end-to-end solutions—whether that's training ML regression models, crafting full-stack web apps with Django and React, or building automated web scrapers. I'm currently pursuing my BCA and always looking for the next exciting problem to solve.

mobileFeaturedProjects.title: SnipTxt: OCR Platform
mobileFeaturedProjects.desc: Web OCR system using CNN + BiLSTM + CTC for text recognition. Built with Django REST, React.js, and MySQL.

mobileFeaturedProjects.title: NEPSE Stock Journal
mobileFeaturedProjects.desc: Stock journal with tax/fee calculations, portfolio analytics, and financial reporting for Nepal's stock exchange.

mobileFeaturedProjects.title: Productivity Prediction
mobileFeaturedProjects.desc: Garment employee productivity prediction with EDA and XGBoost regression, achieving R² ≈ 0.94.

mobileContact.heading: Let's work together
mobileContact.body: Open to internships, collaborations, and freelance projects. Drop me a message and I'll get back within 24 hours.

about.pageSubtitle: Aspiring AI Engineer · BCA Student · Based in Kathmandu, Nepal
about.educationQuote: Constant learning is the only way to navigate the evolving digital landscape.
bio: I am Sawan Mukhiya, an aspiring AI/ML Engineer, Fullstack Developer, and Web Scraper from Kathmandu. I love the thrill of turning ideas into reality, whether that means training a neural network to recognize text, designing a clean REST API, or scraping hard-to-reach data from the web. I enjoy working at the intersection of intelligence and software — where messy data transforms into clean, impactful applications.

Currently pursuing my Bachelor in Computer Application at National College of Computer Studies, my days are a mix of studying and building. I spend my time training machine learning models using PyTorch and Scikit-learn, developing full-stack web apps with Django and React, and engineering robust web scrapers with Playwright.

Whether I'm building my OCR platform SnipTxt, predicting productivity with XGBoost, or structuring complex web data into clean JSON schemas, my philosophy is simple: write code that solves real problems and makes life a little easier for everyone.
about.philosophyQuote: Building intelligent systems that make data speak — from raw numbers to real decisions.
about.philosophyBody: I believe the best AI isn't the most complex — it's the most useful. Every project I build is a step toward software that genuinely helps people understand and act on information around them.

interestCards.title: Data Analysis & ML
interestCards.desc: Using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn to uncover patterns and build predictive models like XGBoost.

interestCards.title: OCR & AI Apps
interestCards.desc: Built a production-grade OCR system using CNN + BiLSTM + CTC with Django REST and React frontend.

interestCards.title: Scraping & Pipelines
interestCards.desc: Developing robust web scrapers with Playwright to extract, normalize, and pipeline data into JSON/CSV schemas.

interestCards.title: Full Stack & APIs
interestCards.desc: Building end-to-end apps, financial tech, and robust APIs with Django REST Framework and React.js.

resume.pageSubtitle: Aspiring AI/ML Engineer, Fullstack Developer, and Web Scraper — building intelligent and scalable tools from Kathmandu.
resume.careerGoal: My goal is to grow as an AI/ML Engineer and Fullstack Developer by building systems that make a genuine impact. I love diving into everything from training machine learning models and engineering web scrapers to developing complete web applications. I'm eager to join collaborative teams where I can bring ideas to life and solve real-world problems that matter.

experience.company: Camden Tools Ltd (UK-based construction tools retailer)
description: Developed a compliance-aware product classification pipeline for restricted inventory (knives, fragile goods, liquids, electrical plugs).
Managed end-to-end data handling, including rigorous data cleaning, feature engineering, and both manual and script-based data labeling.
Engineered machine learning models using XGBoost and LightGBM, optimized with Optuna for hyper-parameter tuning, and integrated 384-dimensional SentenceTransformer embeddings.
Built a FastAPI microservice backend to expose classification endpoints and manage probability threshold-based human-in-the-loop review logic.
Developed an Admin Dashboard using Next.js for manual review workflows, backed by MariaDB/MySQL for audit logging and inventory tracking.
Containerized the entire machine learning and backend stack using Docker for scalable production deployment.
Pursuing Bachelor in Computer Application with a focus on AI, data science, and software engineering.
Built various independent projects spanning OCR, fintech, web scraping, ML models, and game development.
Developed automated web-scraping pipelines to extract and normalize data into structured JSON/CSV schemas.
Continuously applying ML/AI concepts through PyTorch and Scikit-learn, with emphasis on computer vision and NLP.
Always having an eye on Agentic AI, Generative AI and latest AI advancements

education.institution: National College of Computer Studies, Paknajol, Kathmandu

keyProjects.description: Enterprise ML pipeline for classifying restricted inventory using XGBoost, SentenceTransformers, FastAPI, and a Next.js dashboard.

keyProjects.title: Productivity Prediction
